title: Question about the first soundtrack album
display_title: Question about the first soundtrack album
wikitext:
[]: Question about the first soundtrack album             Quote Post by MrCavee » Mon May 05, 2014 5:58 pm I was looking around to buy the first soundtrack album from 1995/2004, and I found what I hope is a legitimate one on Ebay (yeah i know, shudder.) Everything seems okay so far, except the pictures show that it comes with a 56 page booklet. Pictures: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon May 05, 2014 10:20 pm The disc says "KICA-286," so I'd say it's real. The known bootleg is "GA-064"

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue May 06, 2014 12:13 am I have the SM Records bootleg of this. The disc is yellow and has the characters on it and the booklet is shorter and lacks the line drawings.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 07, 2014 3:07 pm There were special booklets released for the first press on the legit King Records release, if that helps any.

Everything seems okay so far, except the pictures show that it comes with a 56 page booklet. Pictures: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon May 05, 2014 10:20 pm The disc says "KICA-286," so I'd say it's real. The known bootleg is "GA-064"
